title: uragoga humilis
intro: Uragoga humilis, also known as the 'forest pepper', is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of piperine, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Uragoga humilis include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Uragoga humilis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments, though its efficacy and safety need further scientific research.
